name: Grecian Chicken Gyros Pizza
recipeIngredient: 3/4 lb Boneless, skinless chicken breast cut into strips (1/4 x 1/4")
1/3 cup Purchased Caesar salad dressing or vinaigrette
1 1/2 tsp chopped fresh mint OR 1/2 tsp dried mint leaves
1 medium Onion, halved lengthwise and cut into 1/8" slices
1/2 cup Diced seeded cucumber (drained on paper towels)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow bowl, combine chicken and salad dressing; stir to coat. Cover, refrigerate.
2. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
3. Lightly grease a 12" pizza pan or a 13 x 9" baking pan.
4. Unroll dough and place in the greased pan. Starting at the center, press out with hands.
5. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes or until the crust is light golden brown.
6. Meanwhile, combine sour cream, mint, pepper, and garlic in a small bowl; mix well.
7. Drain chicken; discard marinade.
8. Heat margarine in a large skillet over medium-high heat until hot. Add chicken and onion; cook and stir 6 to 8 minutes or until the chicken is no longer pink.
9. Spread sour cream mixture over partially baked crust, including edges.
10. Top with Monterey Jack cheese. Using a slotted spoon, place chicken mixture evenly over the cheese.
11. Top with tomato slices, cucumber, and feta cheese.
12. Bake for 10 to 15 minutes or until the edges of the crust are deep golden brown and the Monterey Jack cheese is melted.
13. Garnish with fresh mint leaves, if desired.
